creator: ryan@manunkind.org
text:
loserjabber is a X11/GTK utility which allows users registered at
	livejournal.com to update their journals.  I had submitted this
	previously, but failed to convert to the new port style.  My
	apologies.  Furthermore, sourceforge.net is the only download site
	as of right now, so if you see fit to add it to FreeBSD's distdir,
	please do so.
